rationale: Acting on Review 2's three findings (hb0 duplication + non-obvious inverse/2≠0 chain inside inv_mem' at Quadratic.lean:80; brittle field_simp+show patch at :95; defeq-only rw [prod_map]; rfl at SquareClass.lean:301) produces cleaner, less fragile proofs that directly address the rubric's emphasis on avoiding redundant hypotheses and hand-rolled brittle automation; Review 1's approve misses all of them, leaving the same defects.
